name: Hearty Ham & Waffle Sandwich with Honey Apple Syrup -NHB
recipeIngredient: 2 crisp red apples, such as McIntosh -- cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine 1/2 cup honey and apple juice. Stir over medium heat until heated through. Set aside and keep warm.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, melt butter with the remaining 1/4 cup honey. Add apples; cook and stir for about 4 minutes, or until apple slices are lightly caramelized and crisp-tender.
3. To assemble, place one waffle on each serving plate. Top each with two ham slices and another waffle. Top each sandwich with apple slices and syrup.
[Makes 4 servings. Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 493 Sodium: 926 mg Carbohydrates: 91.7 g Protein: 9.03 g Cholesterol: 43.4 mg Dietary Fiber: 3.18 g Total Fat: 12.5 g Cal. from Fat: 22%]
